name: Modular Patch-Level Image Obfuscation Framework
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y wget ca-certificates gnupg && wget -qO /tmp/cuda-keyring.deb https://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuda/repos/debian13/x86_64/cuda-keyring_1.1-1_all.deb && sudo dpkg -i /tmp/cuda-keyring.deb && rm /tmp/cuda-keyring.deb && sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y cuda-runtime-13-2 && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt
